# Python
__pycache__/
*.py[cod]
*$py.class
*.pyo
*.pyd
.Python

# Virtual environments
venv/
.venv/
env/
.env/

# Distribution / packaging
build/
dist/
*.egg-info/
*.egg
.eggs/

# Installer logs
pip-log.txt
pip-delete-this-directory.txt

# Unit test / coverage
.pytest_cache/
.coverage
htmlcov/
.tox/

# IDEs
.vscode/
.idea/
*.sublime-project
*.sublime-workspace

# macOS
.DS_Store
.AppleDouble
.LSOverride

# Windows
Thumbs.db
ehthumbs.db
Desktop.ini
$RECYCLE.BIN/

# Playwright
/playwright-report/
/test-results/

# App-generated files
blocklist_cache.txt
whitelist_*.csv
scraped_links_*.csv

# Standalone build (see BUILD-INSTRUCTIONS.md) — build/ and dist/ are
# covered above; pw-browsers/ is the local Chromium copy fetched by build.py
pw-browsers/

# Credentials — never commit these
credentials.csv
*.secret
.env
